name: Paddletek Bantam TS-5
description: The Paddletek Bantam TS-5 is the go-to paddle for beginners and recreational players seeking an affordable yet high-quality entry point. Its lightweight polymer core and fiberglass composite face offer a forgiving sweet spot and easy maneuverability, reducing arm fatigue during longer sessions.
care_instructions: Clean with a damp cloth. The fiberglass face is durable for recreational use. Store indoors to protect the edge guard from cracking in cold weather.
